notes: SHIP v1.14.275 - ICON RESTYLE (2 tool icons; owner-approved from files (65).zip proof: "ship audits + burndown, keep the frameless bot"). Asset-only swap, SAME filenames so ZERO HTML markup change - the img src refs at :26581/:26582 are unchanged; only the three version stamps move. WHAT: phantom-tool-audits-256.webp and phantom-tool-burndown-256.webp re-arted to the clean machined cyan/violet frame + a SINGLE subject and NO baked-in text (audits = clipboard + magnifier; burndown = glowing fibre bundle), replacing the busy prior art that baked legible words into the icon ("AUDIT / DOCUMENT / COMPLY"; "BAD FIBERS LIST / CLEAN SIGNAL, STRONG BUILD"). That baked text was the icon-law violation (owner ruling 2026-07-05: no large legible title words on icon art); the tool CARDS already render the label beside the icon (BURNDOWN/PROGRESS, AUDITS/SERIALS), so the words were redundant AND non-compliant. Both new files VP8X 256x256, validated. WHY the SW bump: both are in PRECACHE_URLS, so without a CACHE_VERSION bump devices keep the OLD art (the .213 plate-swap gotcha) - three-stamp .274->.275 forces the refetch. ASSISTANT ICON DELIBERATELY NOT SHIPPED: the files (65).zip also contained a re-arted phantom-ui-assistant-256.webp with the same machined frame, but its consumer is the Ask-PHANTOM launcher (:12641) whose .prism span is ALREADY a 56px violet framed tile rendering the art at 36px with an alpha-shape glow - a framed icon there = a frame-in-a-frame + a square halo. Owner ruled "keep the frameless bot"; the current 198x191 frameless assistant art is untouched. reh3d/rack scene untouched (the re-armed lock is not in play - this is icon assets). Gates: node --check 4/0; CSS 12 balanced; CRLF uniform (HTML delta = the version constant ONLY); three-stamp .274->.275. John iPhone gate: [1] Work tool grid: AUDITS + BURNDOWN cards show the new clean framed art (no baked words); assistant launcher UNCHANGED (still the frameless bot). [2] hard-refresh / SW updates so the new bytes load (bump forces it). [3] ?legacy=1 unaffected (icons are rd tool-grid art).
